src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-person-001 title: validate `person` class attribute getters and setters module: person source files or pages: 1 covered methods: preconditions: `person` object is instantiated with default values (name: null, age: 0, gender: null). test data: - valid name: "john doe" - valid age: 30 - valid gender: "male" - invalid age: -5, 150 - invalid gender: "m", "male", "male", "123" test steps: 1. create a new `person` object. 2. call `setage(-5)` and verify behavior. 3. call `setage(150)` and verify behavior. 4. call `setage(30)` and verify `getage()` returns 30. 5. call `setgender("m")` and verify `getgender()` returns "m" (or original value if rejected). 6. call `setgender("male")` and verify `getgender()` returns "male". 7. call `getname()` and verify it returns `null` (no setter provided). 8. call `setgender("123")` and verify behavior. expected result: - `setage(-5)` and `setage(150)` either throw exceptions or silently fail (no negative/out-of-range ages). - `setage(30)` succeeds; `getage()` returns 30. - `setgender("male")` succeeds; `getgender()` returns "male". - `getname()` returns `null` (no setter). - `setgender("m")` or `setgender("123")` either rejects input or normalizes it (e.g., to "male" or "unknown"). unit: project:

src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-map-001 title: validate `map` and `mapppa` class interactions module: map source files or pages: 3 covered methods: preconditions: `map` and `mapppa` objects are instantiated. test data: - key-value pairs: `("ny", "new york")`, `("la", "los angeles")` - non-existent key: `"sf"` - null key/value: `null` test steps: 1. add `("ny", "new york")` to `mapppa` and verify `map` reflects the addition. 2. check if `map` contains `"ny"` and verify it returns `true`. 3. remove `"ny"` from `mapppa` and verify `map` reflects the removal. 4. check size of `map` after removal and verify it returns `0`. 5. attempt to add `null` key/value and verify behavior. 6. check for non-existent key `"sf"` and verify `map` returns `false`. expected result: - key-value pairs are correctly added/removed in both `map` and `mapppa`. - size updates correctly after additions/removals. - `null` keys/values are either rejected or handled gracefully (e.g., ignored). - non-existent keys return `false` for containment checks. unit: project:
